dialogues: Here's a bookshelf with rows of books. Each row holds 7 books. There are some rows on the shelf.
Right. 28 is a multiple of 7 because 7 × 4 = 28. That could be on the shelf. Multiples of 7 show up everywhere rows of 7 things appear.
Right. 35 is a multiple of 7 because 7 × 5 = 35. That could be on the shelf. Multiples of 7 show up everywhere rows of 7 things appear.
